paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.32, representing a decrease of 3.95% from the prior close and 20.9% over the last 21 sessions. There have been 2 new news items in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include "Project Matador: World’s largest AI data center coming to Panhandle" from NewsChannel 10 on MSN and "Fermi Inc. Admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights" from PR Newswire, both dated 2026-07-23. These headlines suggest that the company is making progress on its projects and has made announcements regarding its shares.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including an 8-K filing on 2026-07-23 announcing the appointment of new officers, and an 8-K filing on 2026-07-15 regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in convertible senior notes. Additionally, there was a Form 4 filing, and 5 new social media posts in the last 24 hours, with samples including "Latest 8K" and "5.0 Earthquake hits panhandle".
